Metadata.title: Dindin — budget-envelope money management
Metadata.description: Organize your income and spending into categorized budget envelopes. Free app by Café Labs, available on the web.

Hero.title: Budget-envelope money management
Hero.description: Income comes in, gets allocated across categories, and spending comes out of each envelope. That simple.

Features.item1Description: Every deposit is split across your envelopes on the spot, no spreadsheet and no manual math.
Features.item2Description: Every expense comes out of the right envelope, so you always know what's left to spend in each category.
Features.item3Description: Export all your data as JSON whenever you want, and import it back to migrate between accounts.

Demo.title: How budget envelopes work
Demo.description: Try the values below: add funds, allocate to an envelope, transfer between them. Just a taste of how the real app works.
Demo.errorValueRequired: Enter an amount greater than zero.
Demo.alocarErrorExceeds: Amount is greater than the account balance ({balance}).
Demo.alocarNeedsBalance: Add funds to the account before allocating.
Demo.transferNoEligible: No envelope has a balance to transfer yet — allocate something first.
Demo.previewNote: Local preview — nothing is saved. Refreshing the page resets everything.
Demo.announceAdded: Funds added. Account balance is now {amount}.
Demo.announceAllocated: Allocated {amount} to {name}. Account balance is now {balance}.
